zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Kirton Lincolnshire Coney於1462年出生在英國林可爾史爾吉爾頓時，他的父親Godfrey Coney42歲，母親Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike40歲。他於1484年與Alice Bell在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1509年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾波斯頓享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Kirton Lincolnshire Coney于1462年出生在英国林可爾史爾吉爾頓时，他的父亲Godfrey Coney42岁，母亲Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike40岁。他于1484年与Alice Bell在英国英格兰林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1509年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾波斯頓享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Coney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English cony ‘rabbit’ (a back-formation from conies, from Old French conis, plural of conil), perhaps for someone thought to resemble a rabbit in some way or who wore rabbit skin or who sold rabbits or their skins. One York trader with this name in 1323 was a peleter or furrier.

variants.name: Cunning
meanings: Irish and Scottish (Fife): variant of Scottish or English Conning, from Middle English, Anglo-Norman French coning ‘rabbit’, used for someone thought to resemble a rabbit in some way; perhaps also an occupational name for a furrier. See also Coney .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Kirton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Kirton (Lincolnshire, Nottinghamshire, Suffolk), or Kirton in Lindsey (Lincolnshire). The placenames derive from Old Norse kirkja ‘church’ (probably replacing Old English cirice ‘church’) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Kerton
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name from Keaton in Ermington, Devon, Ketton in Durham, or Ketton in Rutland.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Kirton Lincolnshire Coney was born in 1462, in Kirton, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Godfrey Coney, was 42 and his mother, Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike, was 40. He married Alice Bell in 1484, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1509, in Boston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Kirton Lincolnshire Coney est né en 1462, à Kirton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Godfrey Coney, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Alice Bell en 1484, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1509, à Boston, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Kirton Lincolnshire Coney 1462 in Kirton, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Godfrey Coney 42 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike 40. Er hat 1484 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Bell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1509 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Boston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Kirton Lincolnshire Coney è nato il nel 1462 nel Kirton, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Godfrey Coney, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Alice Bell nel 1484, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1509, nel Boston, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Kirton Lincolnshire Coneyが1462年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアキルトンで生まれた時，父Godfrey Coneyは42歳，母Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledikeは40歳であった。1484年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでAlice Bellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1509年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアボストンで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Kirton Lincolnshire Coney(이)가 1462년 영국 링코실르 커턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Godfrey Coney(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1484년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 Alice Bell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1509년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 보스턴에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Kirton Lincolnshire Coney nasceu em 1462, em Kirton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Godfrey Coney, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Bell em 1484, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Kirton Lincolnshire Coney родился в 1462 г. в местности киртон, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Godfrey Coney было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Bell в 1484 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1509 г. в местности бостон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Kirton Lincolnshire Coney nació en 1462, en Kirton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Godfrey Coney, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Alice Bell en 1484, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1509, en Boston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años.
